name_en: 🔥 New Arrival🔥 《 PRADA》 Prada 🎉 P-Brand New Women's Embroidered Waist Bag 😘😘😘 This rhombus-embroidered waist bag is made from original plain weave. The front logo exudes the timeless charm of classic fashion [Rose][Rose][Rose], adjustable belt with buckle, spacious zippered pocket highlights practicality. Possesses a trendsetting fashion style
